# TS18 Evidence Report Template

## Evidence labels
- Evidence confidence: Observed / Inferred / Hypothesis / Requires TS18 validation / Unsupported
- Porting decision: Directly reusable requirement / Reusable validation idea / Useful as evidence only / Obsolete due to Auxio architecture / Requires TS18 runtime validation / Unsafe to port / Should be explicitly avoided

## Redaction checklist
- Device fingerprint/serials: redact or omit.
- Package lists: include only relevant package names unless explicitly requested.
- Wi-Fi/Bluetooth identifiers: redact SSID, BSSID, MAC, and friendly names.
- File paths/library names: redact personal directory segments.
- Notifications: redact personal messages/contact names.
- Screenshots/videos: blur personal metadata before sharing.

## Scenario result
- Scenario ID:
- Status: pass / fail / blocked / not captured / requires manual review
- Evidence confidence:
- Porting decision:
- Native/private investigation candidate: yes/no/maybe
- Notes:
